# Offer-Market Fit Thresholds

Offer-market fit exists when the buyer sees the next step as obviously worth the effort.

| Signal | Weak | Promising | Strong |
|---|---:|---:|---:|
| Search ad CTR | <2% | 2-5% | >5% |
| Social hook hold | <15% | 15-30% | >30% |
| Landing proof engagement | <10% | 10-25% | >25% |
| Trial start from landing page | <1% | 1-5% | >5% |
| Activation from trial | <15% | 15-40% | >40% |
| Sales call show rate | <40% | 40-70% | >70% |

Thresholds trigger investigation, not blind scaling.
